dialogueChunks.intro: Things have gotten worse. While you were investigating {quest_focus_the}, an incident {location_hint} has pushed both sides closer to violence.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that armed groups {location_hint} were spotted near our borders. Whether it's posturing or preparation, {quest_threat_the} is escalating. The {enemy_type_plural} are exploiting the distraction to raid both settlements.
dialogueChunks.outro: Deal with the {enemy_type} raids first. If both settlements see you fighting their common enemy, it might cool tempers long enough to find a real solution for {quest_stakes_the}.

dialogueChunks.intro: Both sides claim innocence, and both sides blame the other. The truth about {quest_focus_the} is out there, but it won't come from accusations alone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} insists they had nothing to do with it, and they seem genuine. {quest_ally} suggests speaking with people who were {location_hint} when the incident happened: someone must have seen something the {enemy_type_plural} left behind.
dialogueChunks.outro: Question the people in the area and piece together what really happened. {quest_stakes_the} hang on what you uncover.

dialogueChunks.intro: The dispute over {quest_focus_the} has split opinions within our own settlement. Some side with {target_npc}, saying we were in the wrong all along.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is trying to hold things together, but the internal division is giving {quest_threat_the} room to grow. Meanwhile, the {enemy_type_plural} raided our stores {location_hint} while everyone was arguing.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need to show strength against the common threat. Clear out the {enemy_type_plural} and remind both factions what the real danger is. A common cause might be the only thing that saves {quest_stakes_the}.
